name: workflow-kit
description: Workflow kit with feature-delivery orchestration, PRD, ADR, implementation plans, wave-based subagents, review and verification gates

interface.shortDescription: Planejamento, review e execucao de features com subagents por wave
interface.longDescription: Kit de skills para entrega de features: PRD, ADR, planos, review-plan, test-guide e Integration Coordinator para execucao paralela em qualquer codebase.
defaultPrompt: Classifique este pedido com /feature-delivery em triage.
Crie o plano de implementacao para esta feature.
Revise o plano antes de executar.
